description_long: This is a robust, outdoor-style desk constructed primarily from wooden planks and supported by sturdy, black metal legs. The desk features a wide, flat wooden surface suitable for writing or working, with a slightly angled back panel that may serve as a modesty panel or support. The wood shows some natural grain and minor weathering, suggesting it is designed for durability in public or urban environments. The metal legs are thick and angled outward, providing stability and a modern industrial aesthetic. The desk lacks drawers or additional storage, emphasizing simplicity and function. Its overall design is practical, making it ideal for communal or public use in parks, plazas, or outdoor study areas.
description: A sturdy, outdoor desk with a wide wooden surface and black metal legs, designed for public or communal use. The desk features a simple, weathered wood finish and a supportive back panel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black metal legs and the back panel, with the wood grain visible on the rear surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the angled metal legs, as well as the slight incline of the back panel.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full width of the wooden surface and the clean, plank-style design with visible fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plank arrangement and the robust metal leg structure.
attribute_location: urban park or public outdoor area
attribute_orientation: The front of the desk is the wide, flat wooden surface intended for user interaction, with the back panel providing support and modesty; the metal legs are positioned at the sides for stability.
attribute_usage_context: outdoor writing or study desk for public or communal use
